queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how negative checking account balances function as credit risk drivers and contribute to the determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of lacking a checking account on credit risk drivers and its correlation with the determinants of default.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Assessment of how critical credit history or existing credit obligations serve as mitigating factors that reduce the determinants of default.
